name: Crunchy Almond Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 ½ oz) cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut asparagus into 3/4-inch pieces.
2. Cook in 1 cup lightly salted water until tender-crisp.
3. Drain asparagus, reserving liquid.
4. Combine seasoned crumbs and cheese; set aside.
5. Combine soup, reserved liquid, and asparagus.
6. Layer half of crumb mixture in a buttered 2 quart casserole.
7. Top with half of asparagus.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Toss chopped almonds with melted butter; sprinkle over casserole.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes. Serves 6. May use canned or frozen asparagus out of season.
